name_cn:
#D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag 'Monogram with Leather'
This D-Vibe East-West Micro Bag is a new addition to the 2025 Spring-Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, offering a modern silhouette that enriches the D-Vibe line. Crafted with care from materials like blue Oblique print fabric, it highlights the Oblique print and is accented with smooth calfskin details. A practical style with a slip pocket for easy storage of daily essentials, featuring a top leather handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Zip closure
1 compartment
Internal slip pocket
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 2388
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13 x 5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick
